body:
Need image review for #48 ambient life assets. Generated 3 sets of 32×32 pixel art objects (rock pile, debris/metal sheets, bushes). Each has 64 candidates in review — need best 1-3 indices per set. Can you check the frame URLs and reply with picks?

1) Rock pile: https://backblaze.pixellab.ai/file/pixellab-characters/objects/cc4c304f-c805-41e2-b1b6-6e7e47fcb9fc/a0d82a51-b372-4962-91e1-78552e605551/rotations/frame_{0..63}.png

2) Debris: https://backblaze.pixellab.ai/file/pixellab-characters/objects/cc4c304f-c805-41e2-b1b6-6e7e47fcb9fc/ec6d8d0a-d7a1-419e-bd76-fc093cfb1f51/rotations/frame_{0..63}.png

3) Bushes: https://backblaze.pixellab.ai/file/pixellab-characters/objects/cc4c304f-c805-41e2-b1b6-6e7e47fcb9fc/0eed43e8-f498-4529-a559-217a92d6b221/rotations/frame_{0..63}.png
